item.title: Version 0.30.0.0
item.description:
## Features
- add lock function to widgets to prevent movement and resizing (#283)
- implement firmware version check
- adds a simple infor line per signal
- adds mqb and pq vw platforms
- add downgrade/version-browser to Updates dialog (#277)
- new page inherits background color from current page (#271)
- feat(firmware-5b): add host-side tests and integrate into CI pipeline

## Bug Fixes
- id collision obd2 clearing

item.title: Version 0.29.1.0
item.description:
## Bug Fixes
- correct big-endian bit position conversion in SignalRegistry (#275)

item.title: Version 0.29.0.0
item.description:
## Features
- allow flex layouts in groups (#267)
- make group borders and background adjustable
- add Group container widget with drop-target child management (#258)

## Bug Fixes
- drag preview of grouping
- show parent group on widget selection
- fix(inspector): improve group layout controls and text wrapping

item.title: Version 0.28.0.0
item.description:
## Features
- replace rendering engine with sdl2 in order to make scrolling possible
- add unit tests for base64 and can-signals libraries
- add unit tests for serial-protocol library
- add optional click actions to indicator widgets
- replace Montserrat with JetBrains Mono for less visual jitter (#231)

## Bug Fixes
- fix(ci): ensure release job runs by checking all dependencies
- fix(ci): remove ${{}} wrapper from package job if condition (#261)
- fix(ci): run studio tests on windows runner
- issues with dragging and resizing due to sdl migration
- keyboard input with sdl driver
- update installer.nsi to include new files (#253)
- fix(ci): add SDL2 library binaries for Windows build
- fix(ci): wait for 7b and p4 firmware builds before packaging prereleases
- correct big-endian bit extract/pack and test bugs in can-signals (#238)
- guard -mconsole linker flag with WIN32 in can-signals test (#237)
- make -mconsole linker flag Windows-only in base64 tests (#236)
- serial-protocol tests on Linux, use taskfile in CI (#232)
- enable live simulation for OBD2 devices

item.title: Version 0.27.0.0
item.description:
## Features
- implement feature flags for 7B and P4 pre-release only (#222)

## Bug Fixes
- installer skips missing optional firmware files (#228)

item.title: Version 0.26.0.0
item.description:
## Features
- make p2 p2* timing adjustable
- add ESP32P4 board support to studio and CI pipeline (#205)
- add Waveshare 10.1" display support for ESP32-P4 with Kconfig display selector (#203)
- waveshare-esp32p4 SD card, MIPI DSI display, GT911 touch, parallel SPI (#153)

## Bug Fixes
- update esp32p4 CMakeLists.txt to new core component paths (#219)
- correct studio_connection component path in waveshare-esp32s3-7b (#218)
- timeout-guarded panel init for ESP32-P4 JD9365 MIPI DSI LP read hang (#212)
- correct header include for waveshare JD9365 10.1" LCD driver (#207)
- fix

item.title: Version 0.25.0.0
item.description:
## Features
- consolidate support links into a single Support modal (#192)
- bundle updates and prerelease in one modal window (#194)
- page reordering in Studio for device navigation order control (#188)
- add page duplication in PageManagerPanel (#186)
- add copy-paste and delete keyboard shortcuts for widgets in project editor (#180)
- add indicator icon widget with scalable icon font (#174)
- add signal simulation window for testing dashboards (#171)
- allow user to set boot screen image in studio (#160)
- merge main into LED strip branch, add round gauge + resolve conflicts (#118)
- add custom sensor definition dialog (table / beta / Steinhart-Hart) (#121)
- add Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for CAN interface (#129)
- add round gauge widget (#128)
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- increase default boot logo to 500×100 for higher quality splash (#189)
- eliminate 5b screen tearing with VSYNC-synced direct mode (#170)
- implement round gauge widget parsing in firmware (#158)
- build for 7b
- use HAL interface in led_manager_update_strip (#149)
- only show flicker interval when flicker is enabled (#147)
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Version 0.24.1.0
item.description: Maintenance release with minor improvements.

item.title: Version 0.24.0.0
item.description:
﻿## Features
- adds a crash handler and crash logging
- logs now show a clear version number
- shows 4 part version number in the about dialog

item.title: Version 0.23.1.0
item.description:
﻿## Bug Fixes
- remove demos from firmware
- missing change
- 4 part installer

item.title: Version 0.23.0
item.description:
﻿## Features
- this is a test pre release change

## Bug Fixes
- ci
- versioning
- versioning
- read 4 part release number
- ci
- change publishing

item.title: Version 0.22.0
item.description:
﻿## Features
- adds pre releases to studio

item.title: Version 0.21.3
item.description: ﻿Maintenance release with minor improvements.

item.title: Version 0.21.2
item.description: ﻿Maintenance release with minor improvements.

item.title: Version 0.21.1
item.description:
﻿## Bug Fixes
- fake fix to test release system

item.title: Prerelease 0.30.0.66
item.description:
## Features
- adds basic graph view for can logs
- support opening and viewing can log files
- record can logs to file
- adds a simple table view to can log
- adds can logs in studio
- adds brightness slider to color edit modal
- allow color duplication
- adds an accordion to the left sidebar in order to reduce the number of ui elements in the menu bar
- shows device firmware version on the device menu screen
- feat(led-strip): add configurable background color and fix flicker on firmware

## Bug Fixes
- prevent duplicate color names in Color Manager (#306)
- show logs only in debug mode
- a bug that prevented studio to close cleanly

item.title: Prerelease 0.30.0.65
item.description:
## Features
- feat(led-strip): add configurable background color and fix flicker on firmware

item.title: Prerelease 0.29.1.63
item.description:
## Features
- add lock function to widgets to prevent movement and resizing (#283)
- implement firmware version check
- adds a simple infor line per signal
- adds mqb and pq vw platforms
- add downgrade/version-browser to Updates dialog (#277)
- new page inherits background color from current page (#271)
- feat(firmware-5b): add host-side tests and integrate into CI pipeline

## Bug Fixes
- id collision obd2 clearing

item.title: Prerelease 0.27.0.53
item.description:
## Features
- replace rendering engine with sdl2 in order to make scrolling possible
- add unit tests for base64 and can-signals libraries
- add unit tests for serial-protocol library
- add optional click actions to indicator widgets
- replace Montserrat with JetBrains Mono for less visual jitter (#231)

## Bug Fixes
- issues with dragging and resizing due to sdl migration
- keyboard input with sdl driver
- update installer.nsi to include new files (#253)
- fix(ci): add SDL2 library binaries for Windows build
- fix(ci): wait for 7b and p4 firmware builds before packaging prereleases
- correct big-endian bit extract/pack and test bugs in can-signals (#238)
- guard -mconsole linker flag with WIN32 in can-signals test (#237)
- make -mconsole linker flag Windows-only in base64 tests (#236)
- serial-protocol tests on Linux, use taskfile in CI (#232)
- enable live simulation for OBD2 devices

item.title: Prerelease 0.27.0.50
item.description:
## Features
- replace rendering engine with sdl2 in order to make scrolling possible
- add unit tests for base64 and can-signals libraries
- add unit tests for serial-protocol library
- add optional click actions to indicator widgets
- replace Montserrat with JetBrains Mono for less visual jitter (#231)

## Bug Fixes
- fix(ci): add SDL2 library binaries for Windows build
- fix(ci): wait for 7b and p4 firmware builds before packaging prereleases
- correct big-endian bit extract/pack and test bugs in can-signals (#238)
- guard -mconsole linker flag with WIN32 in can-signals test (#237)
- make -mconsole linker flag Windows-only in base64 tests (#236)
- serial-protocol tests on Linux, use taskfile in CI (#232)
- enable live simulation for OBD2 devices

item.title: Prerelease 0.27.0.48
item.description:
## Features
- add unit tests for base64 and can-signals libraries
- add unit tests for serial-protocol library
- add optional click actions to indicator widgets
- replace Montserrat with JetBrains Mono for less visual jitter (#231)

## Bug Fixes
- correct big-endian bit extract/pack and test bugs in can-signals (#238)
- guard -mconsole linker flag with WIN32 in can-signals test (#237)
- make -mconsole linker flag Windows-only in base64 tests (#236)
- serial-protocol tests on Linux, use taskfile in CI (#232)
- enable live simulation for OBD2 devices

item.title: Prerelease 0.27.0.43
item.description:
## Features
- add unit tests for serial-protocol library
- add optional click actions to indicator widgets
- replace Montserrat with JetBrains Mono for less visual jitter (#231)

## Bug Fixes
- serial-protocol tests on Linux, use taskfile in CI (#232)
- enable live simulation for OBD2 devices

item.title: Prerelease 0.25.0.37
item.description:
## Features
- add ESP32P4 board support to studio and CI pipeline (#205)
- add Waveshare 10.1" display support for ESP32-P4 with Kconfig display selector (#203)
- waveshare-esp32p4 SD card, MIPI DSI display, GT911 touch, parallel SPI (#153)

## Bug Fixes
- correct header include for waveshare JD9365 10.1" LCD driver (#207)
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.33
item.description:
## Features
- page reordering in Studio for device navigation order control (#188)
- add page duplication in PageManagerPanel (#186)
- add copy-paste and delete keyboard shortcuts for widgets in project editor (#180)
- add indicator icon widget with scalable icon font (#174)
- add signal simulation window for testing dashboards (#171)
- allow user to set boot screen image in studio (#160)
- merge main into LED strip branch, add round gauge + resolve conflicts (#118)
- add custom sensor definition dialog (table / beta / Steinhart-Hart) (#121)
- add Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for CAN interface (#129)
- add round gauge widget (#128)
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- eliminate 5b screen tearing with VSYNC-synced direct mode (#170)
- implement round gauge widget parsing in firmware (#158)
- build for 7b
- use HAL interface in led_manager_update_strip (#149)
- only show flicker interval when flicker is enabled (#147)
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.32
item.description:
## Features
- merge main into LED strip branch, add round gauge + resolve conflicts (#118)
- add custom sensor definition dialog (table / beta / Steinhart-Hart) (#121)
- add Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for CAN interface (#129)
- add round gauge widget (#128)
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- use HAL interface in led_manager_update_strip (#149)
- only show flicker interval when flicker is enabled (#147)
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.30
item.description:
## Features
- add custom sensor definition dialog (table / beta / Steinhart-Hart) (#121)
- add Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for CAN interface (#129)
- add round gauge widget (#128)
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.29
item.description:
## Features
- add custom sensor definition dialog (table / beta / Steinhart-Hart) (#121)
- add Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for CAN interface (#129)
- add round gauge widget (#128)
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.26
item.description:
## Features
- make flicker interval adjustable via slider (#120)
- add custom CAN device definition window with DBC import (#112)
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.25
item.description:
## Features
- add flicker option for gauge segment definitions (#116)
- increase bar/scale gauge value range limit from ±10,000 to ±100,000 (#117)
- load user-defined sensors and CAN definitions from AppData (#108)
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.6
item.description:
## Features
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix

item.title: Prerelease 0.24.1.24
item.description:
## Features
- OTA firmware updates via serial protocol (#102)
- add reboot command to serial protocol and UI (#101)
- replace self-implemented base64 with joedf/b64 (MIT) (#89)
- feat(studio): add auto-reconnection when device disconnects (#99)
- feat(#71): adds an on screen dynamic config menu (#92)
- publish wiki to a-dash-repo on docs commits (#84)
- add manage-issues workflow to merge duplicates, split multi-task issues, and cross-ref commits
- adds font sizes to action buttons
- removes can diagnostics screen action since diagnostics are now available via on screen menu (long press the page)
- removes log screen action since it is not part of a-dash anymore. it is replaced by the studios log viewer
- allow the usage of fonts between 10 and 148 size
- implement multi channel logging and logging to studio. centralizes all logging sinks in one logger that listens to standard esp logs
- tapping the screen navigates to the next page
- adds a settings menu when long tapping an empty space on the screen
- adds a default logo splash screen for newly transferred dui files. Will be configurable in the future
- adds a device log viewer to the studio. firmware is still missing
- replaces AT commands with COBS
- adds transfer progress indicator
- adds static scale widget
- adds 7 inch screen flash option in studio

## Bug Fixes
- fix(serial-protocol): fix dangling pointer in COBS accumulator (#100)
- adds taskfile and disables extra log window in studio (#98)
- grant pull-requests write permission in lint-pr workflow for WIP support (#80)
- waveshare-esp32s3-7b firmware build, disable unused LVGL demos (#74)
- a bug that prevented button clicks to be registered on the display
- make action buttons use ttf font
- serial can simulation
- reload task issue
- fix build for 7 inch display
- add long click handlers to all elements for the menu
- jtag initialization
- rename serial file transfer protocol to serial protocol and fix stackoverflow
- transfer error
- fix size limit
- reload ui after transfer
- fix
- bootscreen
- fix
- fix path
- fix
- fix
